scripts.dev: npm run build -w @todo/shared && npm run dev -w @todo/api & npm run dev -w @todo/desktop
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @todo/shared && npm run dev -w @todo/api
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build -w @todo/shared && npm run dev -w @todo/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w @todo/shared && npm run build -w @todo/api && npm run build -w @todo/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @todo/shared && npm run typecheck -w @todo/api && npm run typecheck -w @todo/desktop
scripts.test: npm run build -w @todo/shared && npm run test -w @todo/shared && npm run test -w @todo/api && npm run test -w @todo/desktop
